predictedMetricRange: high: >0.04, moderate: 0.015-0.04, low: <0.015, ambiguous: not point-estimated
predictedFalsifier: low-risk control, missing required field, alternative mechanism, or replay/model-family disagreement
executionPlan: load public data or run safe package check; compare baseline, control, protocol, and replay evidence
noEditRule: Frozen before execution and not rewritten after observation
